textByHash.0361c309e8bb031bc9581eb5a9e0b66dd8dbe584: Just focus on piloting the ship! Narnode isn't going to know what's hit him!
textByHash.0e79a16ecd62ce4716745c99487ebd11fcefc20b: I should've known! The humans are going to invade!
textByHash.19bbf0a3369ae1abcee227e35598ac97621bd20c: Good work getting them back under control Kruk.
textByHash.21980bc1494c4240d8ff7de737b2b6d9ef9cf7d1: We don't need your sort round here!
textByHash.32d439db48268a66ed5352aeb3633e7fa0c8489a: You're a fool human! You have no idea what's going on.
textByHash.3b574df6dd4724a3aca92a0d40515401a9deba95: Let me guess, you need my help...
textByHash.3c06087e70d308b7e0dce948651e6efa05445136: I'm only using our test subjects at the moment, however, once I've processed the mutagen into an airborne form, I'll be able to unleash it across all of Ape Atoll!
textByHash.3f320cdf7788db10c361e2a3a1d16e07ab4abef2: I'm going to find out where Le Smith has disappeared to, I'll let you know when I next require your services. Farewell, Kruk.
textByHash.45d7b2d449c634fc58084d9233fd16d983910d42: Oh... just a measly 200,000 coins. Yes, I think that will do me nicely.
textByHash.4b0ebfeb82503114de1b756803675256f1cff359: This isn't the last you'll see of me, human. Mark my words - the monkeys are listening.
textByHash.4e96fa1b4cedf55c75e36693f3554f9aac455149: Can I help human? Can't you see I'm eating?!
textByHash.509cf55226e8b29cf06bc91f150812a4737a7fe7: The King's a fool and a coward! He'll bow to me! You'll soon be back in that cage!
textByHash.5580ca4bd6bc43c7b373f9e71f7ad6c1df34fe89: Leave human, before I have you put in the cage!
textByHash.5df1b932b23cc773027c0ceb2933580228e888f9: Bah! Never trust a monkey to do a gnome's work.
textByHash.6a58bb5eb2dbcd190a09c29332bab84b103360a9: Right... I forgot I don't keep you around for your brains.
textByHash.6c5416ca867ee0386c53d32686f8a273d5dacc56: Huaarghh! I knew I couldn't rely on these primitive apes, I'll just have to do this myself!
textByHash.7959d7786433a2e197a9fb5f5e3b500e8538eafa: How dare you accuse me! I'm the head tree guardian! Guards! Guards!
textByHash.7bba7879f0ccadf219569b624749198ccee09f83: Clearly that last strain of the mutagen was too unstable...
textByHash.7c6c210d1bee6f9d954fa871404c6c058d85a2cd: Bah! Well, soon you'll see, the gnomes are ready to fight, in three weeks this tree will be dead wood, in ten weeks it will be 30 battleships! Finally we will rid the world of the disease called humanity!
textByHash.884099b6c301c0f06b8e047622e3abfe8477e0c3: I am able to remotely reinitialise...
textByHash.8b08e2d0e8023cb9c7b3803afdbc0b2548c7ce81: Kruk! Where have you been? The experiments have broken out of their cages again, get them back under control before they destroy any more of my work!
textByHash.8c798b38c519e2803973f5c83206c31c856c3ee6: Of course they would. I'm the only one who knows how to do it.
textByHash.95835a6fe4aabb9aff567c2443210ea80e232531: All that we have to do now is wait for the mutagen to infuse power from these charged onyx gems.
textByHash.98a56818a355f046c7de37b0703c4e3060372e72: You don't know how to do that yet!
textByHash.9e044a10c206e945a324f41ba733f516392850d4: I guess I'll just have to deal with you two meddling buffoons myself!
textByHash.a1e7b9bc643333e448ede68c81dbdb5ba63af5fa: You really are becoming a headache! Well, at least now you can die knowing you were right, it will save me having to hunt you down like all the other human filth of Gielinor!
textByHash.a3a3c12053e64e7a2ed08fc69817c7874cba1989: You. Always it's you. Have you any idea how sick I am of you? What have you even got against me?
textByHash.a7a0797b08c06c561fcc2df8b84176722a7ea802: I think I may have finally found the perfect balance, however, I will need time to carry out some final tests.
textByHash.b2c2ed2f9d51925569ba8bd870590e8315442681: Pay attention when I'm talking to you!
textByHash.b954262b22bd309ff2b322e6572fe33d3031eef3: It's been a pleasure doing business with you.
textByHash.bffe0772d0534b5025dc49d05bdef4f57d04fa55: I warn you now, human: stay out of my affairs!
textByHash.c44ce970829ac9931f0bb338ace02fc7004757eb: So, you know more than I thought! The gnomes fear humanity more than any other race. I just need to give them a push in the right direction. There's nothing you can do traveller! Leave before it's too late!
textByHash.c67d5b741b73964ef711cce816f08dac7ccfa25c: I've been trying to find a mutagen stable enough to allow me to have control over the creatures, whilst keeping them aggressive enough to tear apart anything that stands in our way.
textByHash.d086a788bf82555c97e6b783821017f94fa6e6bc: Oh, will you? The lady talks tough. Let's see how you fare against my best pets!
textByHash.dfbc8e33ce7eecabaa17b93d5b928ff3c4b4dbc9: Le Smith, set our course for the Grand Tree, let's end this once and for all!
textByHash.dfe51cf1ae71dc8bdb881cf98a0c27af4258eec6: I've been experimenting on those specimens you've been gathering for me.
textByHash.f324453fdba1b92c34a394a52fa3dfdf621be2de: Your type can't be trusted! I'll take care of this! Go back to the King.
textByHash.fc1e67ca4ace6e12dabba78aa45030ac190a7380: The Gnome Stronghold is for gnomes alone!
